args:
Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Core API Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/hono-base.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/client/client.ts' bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Core API Read/Write Ledger

## src/index.ts
- Public surface: exports Hono class, types from types.ts, Context from context.ts, HonoRequest type from request.ts, InferRequestType and InferResponseType from client module
- Internal names noticed: re-exports everything from submodules no local implementation
- Imports or neighbors: imports Hono from ./hono, types from ./types, Context from ./context
- Plain-English summary: barrel file for public API surface combines main Hono class with all key types
- Copy-safe detail: exports { Hono } from './hono' and all types from ./types ./context ./request ./client

## src/types.ts
- Public surface: defines Env Variables Bindings types Handler MiddlewareHandler NotFoundHandler ErrorHandler HandlerInterface MiddlewareHandlerInterface OnHandlerInterface Input Schema ToSchema TypedResponse ValidationTargets
- Internal names noticed: RouterRoute ParamKeys ParamKeyToRecord MergePath MergeSchemaPath MergeTypedResponse MergeMiddlewareResponse IfAnyThenEmptyObject IsAny JSONValue JSONParsed Simplify UnionToIntersection FlattenIfIntersect IntersectNonAnyTypes
- Imports or neighbors: imports Context type from ./context HonoBase type from ./hono-base headers and http-status types from ./utils
- Plain-English summary: massive type definition file covers all handler interfaces input schemas response typing and utility types
- Copy-safe detail: exports Handler MiddlewareHandler H NotFoundHandler ErrorHandler on all HandlerInterface methods for 10 levels of handler composition

## src/hono.ts
- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepts options with router and getPath settings
- Internal names noticed: uses SmartRouter as default router composed of RegExpRouter and TrieRouter Router interface Env Schema types BlankEnv BlankSchema
- Imports or neighbors: extends HonoBase from ./hono-base imports router implementations from ./router/utils from ./utils
- Plain-English summary: thin wrapper around HonoBase that initializes SmartRouter by default with two backends
- Copy-safe detail: constructor assigns default router or user provided router instantiates HonoBase super

## src/hono-base.ts
- Public surface: get post put delete options patch all on use methods route basePath mount onError notFound fetch request fire
- Internal names noticed: _basePath path router routes arrays compose errorHandler notFoundHandler compose method dispatch fetch request fire private fields
- Imports or neighbors: imports compose from ./context Context from ./context METHODS from ./router url utils from ./utils
- Plain-English summary: base class holding all routing method definitions mount logic and request dispatch composition
- Copy-safe detail: defines 11 HTTP method handlers implements app.mount for foreign apps sets up error and not-found middleware

## src/context.ts
- Public surface: env res req event executionCtx header body text json html redirect notFound set get var render setLayout getLayout setRenderer
- Internal names noticed: #rawRequest #req #executionCtx #res #status #layout #renderer #notFoundHandler #preparedHeaders #matchResult #path #var Map
- Imports or neighbors: imports HonoRequest from ./request types from ./utils/html status types from ./utils/http-status body utils from ./utils
- Plain-English summary: request lifecycle object with variables response building header management and rendering capabilities
- Copy-safe detail: class provides .set .get for variables .header for headers .text .json .html for responses .redirect .notFound for flow control

## src/request.ts
- Public surface: raw path param query queries header parseBody json text arrayBuffer bytes blob formData valid addValidatedData url method matchedRoutes routePath cloneRawRequest
- Internal names noticed: #validatedData #matchResult routeIndex bodyCache GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol #getDecodedParam #getAllDecodedParams #getParamValue #cachedBody
- Imports or neighbors: imports HTTPException from ./http-exception GET_MATCH_RESULT from ./request/constants types from ./types parseBody from ./utils/body url utils from ./utils
- Plain-English summary: request wrapper providing typed param query header parsing and body consumption with caching
- Copy-safe detail: exports HonoRequest class with param query header parseBody json text arrayBuffer bytes blob formData and cloneRawRequest utility

## src/request/constants.ts
- Public surface: exports unique symbol for matched result accessor
- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol used in request.ts for type-safe access to match result
- Imports or neighbors: no imports exports used by request.ts
- Plain-English summary: holds single symbol for accessing router match result from request object
- Copy-safe detail: exports GET_MATCH_RESULT: unique symbol used in HonoRequest class

## src/utils/body.ts
- Public surface: parseBody function with all and dot options for multipart and form-urlencoded parsing
- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot BodyDataValueDotAll SimplifyBodyData BodyDataValueComponent BodyDataValueObject BodyDataValue handleParsingAllValues handleParsingNestedValues
- Imports or neighbors: imports HonoRequest from ../request
- Plain-English summary: parses form data supporting dot notation for nesting and array flattening with optional flags
- Copy-safe detail: exports parseBody async function converts FormData to nested objects when dot option enabled

## src/compose.ts
- Public surface: compose function takes middleware array error handler and not-found handler returns composed function
- Internal names noticed: dispatch function index variable isError handler variable
- Imports or neighbors: imports Context type from ./context Env ErrorHandler Next NotFoundHandler from ./types
- Plain-English stack: wraps middleware chain with error handling and not-found fallback using koa-compose pattern
- Copy-safe detail: exports compose middleware wrapper that tracks execution index handles errors via onError and not-found via onNotFound

## src/http-exception.ts
- Public surface: HTTPException class extends Error with status res and getResponse method
- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions type with res message and cause fields
- Imports or neighbors: imports ContentfulStatusCode from ./utils/http-status

## src/client/index.ts
- Public surface: exports hc function parseResponse DetailedError and type exports InferResponseType InferRequestType ClientRequestOptions ClientResponse ApplyGlobalResponse PickResponseByStatusCode

- Imports or neighbors: exports hc from ./client parseResponse and DetailedError from ./utils all types from ./types

## src/client/client.ts
- Public surface: hc function accepts baseUrl and options creates typed proxy for making requests

- Imports or neighbors: imports Hono type from ../hono FormValue ValidationTargets from ../types cookie serialize from ../utils/cookie types from ./types utils from ./utils UnionToIntersection from ../utils/types
- Plain-English summary: hc utility builds typed request proxy chain parses queries params and calls fetch
- Copy-safe detail: function createProxy wraps callback with path creates ClientRequestImpl for actual HTTP call

## src/client/types.ts
- Public surface: ClientRequestOptions ClientRequest ClientResponse Client fetch type BuildSearchParamsFn InferResponseType InferRequestType InferRequestOptionsType ApplyGlobalResponse PickResponseByStatusCode FilterClientResponseByStatusCode
- Internal names noticed: ExpandAllMethod StandardMethods HonoRequest BuildSearch BuildPath BuildPathname BuildTypedURL HonoURL ParseHostName TrimStartSlash TrimEndSlash IsLiteral ApplyParam IsEmptyObject TypedURL

- Copy-safe detail: exports hc fetch parseResponse types and complex type helpers for request response inference

## src/client/utils.ts
- Public surface: mergePath replaceUrlParam buildSearchParams replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString deepMerge

- Imports or neighbors: imports DetailedError from ./fetch-result-please and ClientResponse types from ./types
- Plain-English summary: string manipulation utilities for URL building search parameter construction and object merging
- Copy-safe detail: exports mergePath replaceUrlParam buildSearchParams replaceUrlProtocol removeIndexString deepMerge functions

## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
- Public surface: fetchRP function parses response body and throws DetailedError on non-ok status
- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set with status codes 101 204 205 304 detectResponseType jsonRegex DetailedError class with detail code log statusCode properties
- Imports or neighbors: no imports uses Response type from Web API and DetailedError from same module
- Plain-English summary: minimal ofetch clone detects response type from content-type header throws structured errors
- Copy-safe detail: exports fetchRP async function that auto-detects JSON or text returns _data throws DetailedError on error status

## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
- Public surface: fire function registers Hono app to handle fetch events in service worker
- Internal names noticed: handle imported from ./handler uses addEventListener for fetch binding
- Imports or neighbors: imports Hono from ../../hono Env Schema from ../../types handle from ./handler
- Plain-English summary: adapter that wires Hono app to service worker fetch event listener
- Copy-safe detail: function fire binds app to service worker addEventListener('fetch', handle(app options))

## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
- Public surface: handle function wraps Hono app for service worker returns FetchEvent handler
- Internal names noticed: Handler type HandleOptions type with fetch property opts variable respondWith async function
- Imports or neighbors: imports Hono from ../../hono Env Schema from ../../types FetchEvent type from ./types
- Plain-English summary: service worker request handler that calls app.fetch and returns response to navigator
- Copy-safe detail: exports handle function returns async function that calls evt.respondWith with app.fetch result

## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
- Public surface: FetchEvent interface extends ExtendableEvent with clientId handled preloadResponse request resultingClientId respondWith
- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent interface with waitUntil method from Web API
- Imports or neighbors: no imports standard web API types
- Plain-English summary: typed FetchEvent interface matching Service Worker specification
- Copy-safe detail: defines FetchEvent with clientId handled preloadResponse request resultingClientId and respondWith method
